items.title: Ebuka Okorie to Detroit after having to start Daniss Jenkins and get Marcus Sasser in the rotation by the end of semifinals to give Cade Cunningham any kind of relief
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Ebuka Okorie to Detroit after having to start Daniss Jenkins and get Marcus Sasser in the rotation by the end of semifinals to give Cade Cunningham any kind of relief

And also, after trading Jaden Ivey.

items.title: By the time Marcus Sasser got over a preseason injury, the Pistons were 18-5. His third season was his most challenging, but whenever his number got called Sasser answered the bell.
items.author: Keith Langlois
items.body_excerpt:
By the time Marcus Sasser got over a preseason injury, the Pistons were 18-5. His third season was his most challenging, but whenever his number got called Sasser answered the bell.

www.nba.com/pistons/news...

media.title: Pistons 2025-26 Rewind: As always, Sasser proved ready when needed
media.description: I give Sass a ton of credit because he’s always ready when his number is called,” Bickerstaff said.
